summary: Admin Sidebar Navigation Testing Complete - All 12 test cases PASSED. Verified: (1) Admin login loads dashboard with sidebar visible on left, (2) All 8 nav groups present (Overview, Users, Content Engine, Jobs & Pipelines, Revenue & Credits, Analytics, System Health, Security), (3) Active state highlighting works on Dashboard and all nav items, (4) Navigation to User Management, System Health, Revenue Analytics, Seed Content, Worker Dashboard all work with sidebar persistence, (5) Direct URL entry to /app/admin/workers loads with sidebar and correct active state, (6) Non-admin user (test@visionary-suite.com) is redirected from /app/admin to /app, (7) Back to App link navigates to /app, (8) No duplicate 'Back to Admin' buttons in content areas, (9) Sidebar groups expand/collapse on click.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails with 403 error - not critical for sidebar functionality

critical_code_review_comments: AdminLayout.js correctly implements role-based access guard using JWT token parsing
parseJwtRole() function extracts role from JWT payload and checks for ADMIN or SUPERADMIN
Non-admin users are redirected to /app via navigate('/app', { replace: true })
NAV_GROUPS constant defines all 8 navigation groups with proper paths and icons
NavItem component uses data-testid for each nav item (e.g., admin-nav-user-management)
NavGroup component implements expand/collapse with useState and defaultOpen logic
Active state highlighting uses location.pathname matching with exact flag for Dashboard
Sidebar footer has Back to App link and Logout button with proper data-testid attributes
Mobile sidebar uses mobileOpen state with overlay backdrop for responsive design
All admin routes are nested under <Route path='/app/admin' element={<AdminLayout />}> in App.js
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin and test user accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Sidebar Navigation fully verified. All nav groups expand/collapse correctly. Active state highlighting works. Non-admin access guard redirects to /app. Direct URL entry preserves sidebar. No duplicate Back buttons in content areas.

admin_login_sidebar_visible.details: Admin login -> /app/admin loads with sidebar visible on left

all_nav_groups_present.details: 8 nav groups: Overview, Users, Content Engine, Jobs & Pipelines, Revenue & Credits, Analytics, System Health, Security

dashboard_active_state.details: Dashboard item highlighted with indigo styling on /app/admin

user_management_navigation.details: Click User Management -> /app/admin/users with sidebar visible and active state

system_health_navigation.details: Click System Health -> /app/admin/system-health with sidebar visible and active state

revenue_analytics_navigation.details: Click Revenue Analytics -> /app/admin/revenue with sidebar visible and active state

seed_content_navigation.details: Click Seed Content -> /app/admin/content-engine with sidebar visible and active state

direct_url_workers.details: Direct URL /app/admin/workers loads with sidebar and Worker Dashboard active

back_to_app_link.details: Back to App link in sidebar footer navigates to /app

no_duplicate_back_buttons.details: No duplicate 'Back to Admin' or ArrowLeft buttons in admin page content areas

sidebar_groups_expand_collapse.details: Users group collapsed -> items hidden, expanded -> items visible
